text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hm? What's this... "Trending! The Best of<n>the Best
Umamusume."

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Well, obviously, number one has to be<n>me, King—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Huh? I'm... I'm not?! Then that means—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I must already be listed in their Hall of<n>Fame. ♪
This magazine certainly has<n>great taste.
